title: Lewis MacLeod

|image=[[File:Star_Wars_Sebulba_voice_actor_Lewis_MacLeod.jpg]]
|name=Lewis MacLeod
|birth=[[July 4]], [[1970]]<ref name="birthdate">{{ThisWeek|LGVAPB28tlc|Boba Fett is Back, Vengeance Echoes Through Star Wars: The Old Republic, and More!}} establishes Lewis MacLeod birthdate as [[December 20]], [[1970]], however he corrected this over [[Wikipedia:Twitter|twitter]] to July 4 {{C|{{Twitter|lewismacleod|status/1468008116574986248|Lewis MacLeod|quote=Thank you for the kind message! But my birthday is actually July the 4th!|archivedate=20211207105558}}, in response to "Happy Birthday Lewis MacLeod aka Sebulba. Born 6th December 1970."}}.</ref>
|death=

'''Euan Lewis MacLeod''' (born [[July 4]], [[1970]]) is an actor and voice actor who voiced [[Sebulba]] in [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''The Phantom Menace'']] and several subsequent projects. He also did voice work for several video games as [[Obi-Wan Kenobi]].

==Works==
===Filmography===
*{{Film|I}} - Sebulba

===Gameography===
*[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']] - Sebulba
*''[[Star Wars: Early Learning Activity Center]]'' - DJ
*[[Star Wars: Obi-Wan (video game)|''Star Wars: Obi-Wan'']] - [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' - Obi-Wan Kenobi, [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] missile trooper, [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] carrier pilot
*''[[Star Wars: Super Bombad Racing]]'' - Obi-Wan Kenobi, Sebulba
*''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]'' - Sebulba
*[[LEGO Star Wars: The Skywalker Saga]] - Sebulba
*''[[Star Wars Outlaws]]''
*[[Star Wars: Beyond Victory - A Mixed Reality Playset|''Star Wars: Beyond Victory'' - A Mixed Reality Playset]] – Sebulba<ref name="Credits">[[Star Wars: Beyond Victory - A Mixed Reality Playset|''Star Wars: Beyond Victory'' - A Mixed Reality Playset]] credits</ref>
